rationale: The authoritative metric dictionary establishes that the controlling retention metric is bot-adjusted 30-day retention, not raw retention. The authoritative quality audit reports S-9 bot-adjusted retention of 8% and an eligible sample size of 720. Although 720 meets the minimum eligible sample size of 500, 8% is below the required 10%, so the release rule is not satisfied.
uncertainty: No material uncertainty remains in the controlling metric or eligible sample size based on the supplied authoritative evidence.
